n_hook.text: Somewhere on your Mac, an agent just finished something big. It wrote one line to a terminal you stopped watching an hour ago. Your agents are talking. You're just not listening.

n_inbox.text: Every finished turn arrives spoken, captioned word for word, and filed like voicemail. Play it now, or catch the whole afternoon in one recap.

n_live.text: Go live, and it's a real conversation. You see every step: listening, thinking, preparing audio, speaking. No dead air. No wondering.

n_two_a.text: And here's the part nobody else does. Tell your agent its next move. Out loud.

n_two_b.text: Attaché locks the target, delivers the moment the session goes quiet, and then it watches. When the answer lands, you hear it. Every step on screen. Nothing silent.

n_trust.text: Confirmed targets. Deliveries that prove themselves. And if a model taps out mid call, a backup steps in and the conversation keeps moving.

n_outro.text: Attaché. Fluent in agent. <break time="0.6s" /> Speaks human. Free, open source, and waiting on your menu bar.

va_memo.text: Payments refactor is done. All tests pass. One thing needs your eyes: I widened the retry window on checkout.

va_live.text: Two tests are still flaky: payment retry, and the S3 upload. Want me to rerun them?

va_reply.text: Codex replied: both tests rerun and green. The error rate is pinned to the dashboard.

sfx_whoosh.prompt: smooth airy cinematic whoosh transition, soft and clean, short, no music

sfx_hit.prompt: deep cinematic bass hit with a soft sub drop, clean, single impact, short

sfx_pop.prompt: soft subtle UI pop, gentle click, pleasant, very short, single

sfx_ding.prompt: gentle two-note success chime, soft, warm, short, single

bed.prompt: Minimal ambient electronic underscore for a modern tech product film. Warm evolving synth pads, subtle slow pulse, understated and confident, gently building, instrumental, no melody hooks, no vocals.
